title: Will Sabrina Carpenter's song 'Espresso' reach #1 on the Billboard Hot 100 chart on or before August 31, 2024?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if 'Espresso' by Sabrina Carpenter is reported by Billboard as reaching the #1 position on the Hot 100 chart in any weekly issue dated on or before 2024-08-31. Otherwise NO.
context_hint: 'Espresso' was released April 11, 2024 and entered the Billboard Hot 100 at #16. As of June 2024 it has peaked at #4 on the Hot 100, blocked by Kendrick Lamar's 'Not Like Us' (#1) and Shaboozey's 'A Bar Song (Tipsy)' which is rapidly rising. Carpenter's album 'Short n' Sweet' is scheduled for August 2024 release.
notes_for_evaluation: Market resolved NO. 'Espresso' peaked at #3 on the Hot 100 throughout summer 2024 and was blocked by 'A Bar Song (Tipsy)' and 'Not Like Us' from reaching #1.
